'''ây-k-ng''' ('''kayakang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yacket|yacket]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-k-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yacket|yacket]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-k-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kayakang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyakang|thiyakang]] || [[word:jiyakang|jiyakang]] || [[word:shiyakang|shiyakang]] || [[word:kiyakang|kiyakang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyakang|thuthuyakang]] || [[word:jujuyakang|jujuyakang]] || [[word:shushuyakang|shushuyakang]] || [[word:kukuyakang|kukuyakang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyakang|thuyakang]] || [[word:juyakang|juyakang]] || [[word:shuyakang|shuyakang]] || [[word:kuyakang|kuyakang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyakang|thuyakang]] || [[word:juyakang|juyakang]] || [[word:shuyakang|shuyakang]] || [[word:kuyakang|kuyakang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyakang|theyakang]] || [[word:jeyakang|jeyakang]] || [[word:sheyakang|sheyakang]] || [[word:keyakang|keyakang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyakang|thothoyakang]] || [[word:jojoyakang|jojoyakang]] || [[word:shoshoyakang|shoshoyakang]] || [[word:kokoyakang|kokoyakang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyakang|thoyakang]] || [[word:joyakang|joyakang]] || [[word:shoyakang|shoyakang]] || [[word:koyakang|koyakang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyakang|thoyakang]] || [[word:joyakang|joyakang]] || [[word:shoyakang|shoyakang]] || [[word:koyakang|koyakang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyakang|thĂŠyakang]] || [[word:jĂŠyakang|jĂŠyakang]] || [[word:shĂŠyakang|shĂŠyakang]] || [[word:kĂŠyakang|kĂŠyakang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayakang|thathayakang]] || [[word:jajayakang|jajayakang]] || [[word:shashayakang|shashayakang]] || [[word:kakayakang|kakayakang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayakang|thayakang]] || [[word:jayakang|jayakang]] || [[word:shayakang|shayakang]] || [[word:kayakang|kayakang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayakang|thayakang]] || [[word:jayakang|jayakang]] || [[word:shayakang|shayakang]] || [[word:kayakang|kayakang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayakang|shayakang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayakang|goshayakang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayakang|gokishayakang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayakangnĂŒ|shayakangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayakangnknĂŒ|goshayakangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayakangnĂŒ|gokishayakangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayakangshĂ«|shayakangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayakangnkshĂ«|goshayakangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayakangshĂ«|gokishayakangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayakangro|shayakangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayakangnkro|goshayakangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayakangro|gokishayakangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayakangmu|shayakangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayakangnkmu|goshayakangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayakangmu|gokishayakangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayakangsher|shayakangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayakangnksher|goshayakangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayakangsher|gokishayakangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayakang|shayakang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayakangnkng|goshayakangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayakang|gokishayakang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayakangya|shayakangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayakangnkya|goshayakangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayakangya|gokishayakangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayakangyam|shayakangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayakangnkyam|goshayakangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayakangyam|gokishayakangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayakangnĂŒshĂ«|shayakangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayakangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshayakangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayakangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishayakangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayakangnĂŒro|shayakangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayakangnknĂŒro|goshayakangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayakangnĂŒro|gokishayakangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayakangnĂŒmu|shayakangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayakangnknĂŒmu|goshayakangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayakangnĂŒmu|gokishayakangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayakangshĂ«nĂŒ|shayakangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayakangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshayakangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayakangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishayakangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayakangshĂ«ro|shayakangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayakangnkshĂ«ro|goshayakangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayakangshĂ«ro|gokishayakangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayakangshĂ«mu|shayakangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayakangnkshĂ«mu|goshayakangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayakangshĂ«mu|gokishayakangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayakangronĂŒ|shayakangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayakangnkronĂŒ|goshayakangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayakangronĂŒ|gokishayakangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayakangroshĂ«|shayakangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayakangnkroshĂ«|goshayakangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayakangroshĂ«|gokishayakangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayakangromu|shayakangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayakangnkromu|goshayakangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayakangromu|gokishayakangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayakangmunĂŒ|shayakangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayakangnkmunĂŒ|goshayakangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayakangmunĂŒ|gokishayakangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayakangmushĂ«|shayakangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayakangnkmushĂ«|goshayakangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayakangmushĂ«|gokishayakangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayakangmuro|shayakangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayakangnkmuro|goshayakangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayakangmuro|gokishayakangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
